_comment: Per-sport site identity — single source of truth for org/website JSON-LD AND page chrome (header brand/nav, <title> suffix, og/canonical base, default theme) across sports. A competition resolves its site via its top-level `sport` field (see config/competitions.json); competitions with no `sport` (every existing soccer comp) fall back to the `soccer` block here. The `soccer` block MUST stay byte-identical to the legacy hardcoded strings in build-articles.py — the soccer rebuild regression (zero diff on public/) is the contract. `base` has no trailing slash (code appends it).

soccer.brand_tag: 2026 World Cup · 賽程 + 戰報
soccer.feed_channel_desc: 2026 FIFA 世界盃每日戰報、規則解析與專題文章。

baseball.website_name: @baseball — 中職 CPBL ＋ 大聯盟 MLB 深度戰報
baseball.brand_tag: 中職 + MLB · 數據深度
baseball.feed_channel_title: @baseball — 中職 + MLB 數據深度
baseball.feed_channel_desc: 中華職棒 CPBL 與美國職棒 MLB 的數據深度分析、里程碑特刊與戰績排行。
